name: Reminders
description: Interact with macOS Reminders.app - get reminders, search, create reminders, and manage lists

tools.description: Search reminders by title or notes.
tools.name: search_reminders

tools.description: Open the Reminders app, optionally to a specific reminder.
tools.name: open_reminder

tools.description: Get reminders, optionally filtering by list, status, or date range.
tools.name: get_reminders
